positive: A whimsical, maximalist arrangement of enchanted botanical elements: glowing bioluminescent mushrooms, delicate crystalline flora, coiled jade vines, and tropical monstera leaves. The arrangement should be centered and highly symmetrical, floating against a deep twilight indigo background. The style is a vibrant blend of Art Nouveau and scientific illustration, rendered with saturated jewel tones (emerald green, sapphire blue, amethyst purple, and gold accents). Use strong chiaroscuro lighting, simulating natural magical luminescence emanating from the plants themselves. The composition must be perfect for an apparel print, featuring clean silhouettes and strong contrast against the dark background. High detail, ultra-sharp focus, printed on a matte surface.
negative: text, watermark, logo, signature, artifact, blurry, noise, grain, low resolution, cropped, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, messy border, gradient fade
